language_pack_hint_html: Overlays a translated global.ini (e.g. German) before enhancements are applied. Accepts a local path or a direct .ini URL — GitHub blob/ links work.
modules_legend_html:
DCB — needs the game's DataCore database (Game2.dcb) to derive its patches at runtime.
REPLACE — overwrites entire INI values rather than appending to them. May overwrite text from a community language pack you've loaded.
modules_badge_replace_tooltip: This module overwrites entire INI values. May replace text from your community language pack.
error_discovery_failed: Could not discover Star Citizen installations: {message}
error_global_ini_not_found: global.ini not found inside Data.p4k. The game install may be incomplete.
error_output_write_failed: Could not write the patched global.ini: {message}
error_output_remove_failed: Could not remove the patched global.ini: {message}
warning_undeclared_replace_dropped_one: {module_name}: dropped 1 Replace op (module did not declare uses_replace_ops)
warning_undeclared_replace_dropped_other: {module_name}: dropped {count} Replace ops (module did not declare uses_replace_ops)
language_notice: App now available in English and Deutsch — switch via the gear icon.
module_key_fixes_description: Fix CIG localization bugs where INI keys are misspelled or use legacy naming
module_label_fixes_description: Shorten labels that cause text overlap in the game UI
module_component_grades_derived_descript: Auto-derive class and grade info from game data (e.g. 'Bracer Military C')
option_component_grades_derived_format_d: How to format the component name
choice_component_grades_derived_format_n: Name Class Grade (e.g. Bracer Military C)
module_illegal_goods_description: Mark illegal commodities (drugs, contraband) with [!] prefix
option_illegal_goods_display_description: How to mark illegal goods in the commodity name
choice_illegal_goods_display_color_coded: Emphasised (distinct style for drugs vs contraband)
module_mission_enhancer_description: Enrich mission titles and descriptions with blueprint rewards, cooldowns, and more
option_mission_enhancer_blueprint_tag_de: Add [BP] to titles of missions that reward blueprints
option_mission_enhancer_blueprint_list_d: Append blueprint item list to mission descriptions
option_mission_enhancer_solo_tag_descrip: Add [Solo] to titles of solo-only missions
option_mission_enhancer_once_tag_descrip: Add [Uniq] to titles of one-time-only missions
option_mission_enhancer_illegal_tag_desc: Add [Illegal] to titles of illegal missions
option_mission_enhancer_mission_info_des: Append cooldown, rep reward, and scrip to descriptions
option_mission_enhancer_crimestat_tag_de: Mark missions where killing friendly NPCs gives crimestat
option_mission_enhancer_ship_encounters_: Show hostile and allied ship types in mission descriptions
option_mission_enhancer_cargo_info_descr: Show cargo descriptors (Full/Half/Scraps, HighValue/LowValue) on hostile ships
option_mission_enhancer_region_info_desc: Append the region / body where the mission is offered
module_weapon_enhancer_description: Add size prefixes, missile tracking type, and combat stats to weapon descriptions
option_weapon_enhancer_size_prefix_descr: Add weapon size prefix to names (e.g. S3 Attrition)
option_weapon_enhancer_missile_type_pref: Add tracking type prefix to missile names (e.g. [IR] Ignite)
option_weapon_enhancer_weapon_stats_desc: Append damage, penetration, speed, and ammo stats to weapon descriptions
option_weapon_enhancer_missile_stats_des: Append damage, speed, lock time, and targeting stats to missile descriptions
